# Expand AI Readiness Offer

Use the prompt block below directly in Codex CLI or in an IDE chat window.

## Prompt

```text
Use `docs/output/personal/GenAI_Career_Extension_Assessment_Potato_Mode.html` as the primary source context.

Expand the "AI readiness and opportunity assessment" idea from that document into a standalone HTML asset written in Potato Mode.

The output should:
- pressure-test whether this can become a real paid offer
- stay blunt, commercially sharp, and skeptical of vague consulting language
- evaluate where the offer can work and where it will fail
- define what the flagship version of the product should be
- identify the best product variants worth building
- clarify buyer, value proposition, delivery model, and follow-on revenue path
- explain how it can generate leads, early wins, and sustained income
- include a practical build sequence so it does not remain just a nicely written concept

Writing requirements:
- write in direct plain English
- no hype language
- no generic "AI strategy" filler
- keep the tone senior, opinionated, and commercially grounded
- make the output feel like a decision product, not a soft brainstorm
- use the same polished standalone HTML style as the earlier assessment assets

Suggested output sections:
- title and brief framing
- blunt verdict
- why this product can work
- where it fails if packaged badly
- what the product must actually be
- best flagship offer shape
- product variants worth building
- how to build the method so it survives scrutiny
- how to deliver it without drifting into low-value work
- what buyers will compare it against
- how it creates leads and early wins
- how it becomes sustained income instead of one-off revenue
- strongest public framing
- what to build first
- practical build sequence
- final Potato Mode verdict

Save the result as:
`docs/output/personal/assets/AI_Readiness_Opportunity_Assessment_Expanded_Potato_Mode.html`
```
